Services / Pediatrics and Adolescent Health

Pediatrics and Adolescent Health

  • Well baby and child physicals
  • Immunizations
  • Adolescent reproductive health, including STD testing, treatment, and protection
  • Sick visits

Kids grow up fast. Which means their medical needs are constantly changing. From infancy to adolescence, the caring pediatrics team at CMC is here for them, every step of the way.

Whether you’re visiting for regular recommended checkups and immunizations or the occasional unexpected injury, our expert nurses and physicians are skilled at getting children smiling again.

We’re committed to making sure your children have the care and support they need to grow up healthy, happy, and strong.

Ready to get started?

Our team is here to help. Call us to schedule an appointment at a location near you.

(209) 944-4700 Find a Location
